details: Round 4 re-test of VAL-COMP-007 after fix commit e20fefb (stable sort for top_logprobs alternatives + deduplicate chosen token in legacy JSON). Tested 263 total positions (132 non-streaming + 131 streaming) across 20 requests with diverse prompts, temperature=0.0, top_logprobs=5. Zero sort violations detected. Chosen token always appears first. The previous round 3 violation ('...' at -21.125 appearing before ' jams' at -20.5625 at position 14) is no longer reproducible. All 7 completions-logprobs assertions (VAL-COMP-001 through VAL-COMP-007) now pass.
